title: GLP-1 Medications and Bone Loss: What Women Over 40 Should Know
author: Happy Aging Team
tags: GLP-1, Ozempic, Wegovy, bone loss, osteoporosis, women over 40, semaglutide, bone density, calcium, vitamin D
meta_title: GLP-1 Medications and Bone Loss: What Women Over 40 Need to Know | Happy Aging
meta_description: GLP-1 medications like Ozempic and Wegovy can accelerate bone loss in women over 40 already at risk from perimenopause. Here is the complete bone protection protocol.
